description: Database Blocking Locks - Injects row-level blocking locks (single blocker, N waiters) into an RDS or Aurora database to rehearse detection, diagnosis, and recovery of blocking-lock incidents

InjectBlockingLocks.description: Inject row-level blocking locks against the target database

parameters.documentParameters: {"DatabaseEngine":"postgres","DatabaseEndpoint":"<YOUR DATABASE ENDPOINT>","DatabasePort":"5432","DatabaseName":"postgres","DatabaseUser":"postgres","DatabasePasswordSecretArn":"<YOUR SECRET ARN>","WaiterCount":"50","ExperimentDuration":"PT10M","RampTime":"PT1M","RampSteps":"10","VpcId":"<YOUR VPC ID>","SubnetId":"<YOUR SUBNET ID>","DatabaseSecurityGroupId":"<YOUR DATABASE SECURITY GROUP ID>","InstanceType":"t3.small","TargetTableName":"fis_blocking_locks_target"}
